ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
TENTATIVE RULING: PRELIMINARY TENTATIVE RULING:
The order determining entitlement must be amended if final distribution is to be to specific individuals, not "estates." The 4/22/26 order did NOT order distribution to specific individuals.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nora Woodring appeared by zoom for Cry Quon (administrator).

Mrs. Woodring stated that the status report is ready, that she will be meeting with her client to sign it, and provided an oral report. Status on close of estate is continued to July 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow posting of Mrs. Woodring's petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lopes. Not reported.
